# ngwindsongk

> Premium healthy oats and Nanacare products for new mothers. Founded by Jennifer in Nairobi, Kenya.

## About

ngwindsongk is an e-commerce store offering two main product lines:

1. **Grainmill** - Premium healthy oats including jumbo oats, steel-cut oats, oat flour, and quick breakfast oats. All products are 100% natural with no additives or preservatives.
2. **Nanacare** - Thoughtful products designed for new mothers, including cooler bags, storage cups, and motherhood essentials.

All products are available for delivery across Nairobi with 7 delivery zones.

## Product Categories

- Breakfast Cereal: Jumbo oats, steel-cut oats, oat flour, quick breakfast oats
- Nanacare: Cooler bags, storage cups, motherhood essentials

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://ngwindsongk.com/
- Products: https://ngwindsongk.com/products
- About: https://ngwindsongk.com/about
- Contact: https://ngwindsongk.com/contact
- FAQs: https://ngwindsongk.com/FAQs

## Product URLs

Product pages follow the pattern: https://ngwindsongk.com/products/{category}/{product-name}

## Contact

- Website: https://ngwindsongk.com
- Email: Available via contact page
- Location: Nairobi, Kenya
- Currency: KES (Kenyan Shillings)
